creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
When a USB mass storage device is connected it causes umass.ko to be loaded which then causes a panic: double fault
	The coredump can be downloaded from http://www.nagilum.org/unix/vmcore.1.xz

Fix: rm /boot/kernel/umass*
